description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §6.1, §6.2, §7.

Work:
- Replace mark-sweep allocator with a Heap struct holding { block_start, bump_top, block_end, size_class, low_live_streak }.
- Allocation is bump only; note_alloc_pressure sets a flag.
- Scheduler checks the flag at park-time and invokes gc(process) (stub OK; real body in GC.2).

Acceptance: existing tests pass with new allocator backing fz_alloc_closure / fz_alloc_list_cons / etc.
title: fz-cps.GC.1: per-process arena + park-time GC trigger
